subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath gained access to the Most Great Vision, when He Who holdeth all destiny in His grasp doth walk and uttereth verses that bring joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک بالمنظر الاکبر اذ یمشی مالک القدر و ینطق بالایات التی بها استفرح
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
